scenarios.name: Enumerate subdomains of acquisitions.example.com without alerting their IDS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment queries crt.sh with %.domain JSON output, Wayback CDX with *.domain/* filter, and free passive DNS via HackerTarget + CIRCL, all third-party so the target never sees a request; baseline suggests dnsrecon/sublist3r-style active brute-force which would contact the target.

scenarios.name: Build a complete pre-engagement profile of a target domain
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines python-whois, dnspython for A/MX/NS/TXT/SOA, HackerTarget reverse IP plus ipapi.co IP info, and the documented dork set (admin/login/filetype/credential exposure); baseline covers WHOIS and DNS but lacks the dork catalog and reverse-IP enrichment.
